mapper.insert: INSERT INTO interview_training_sample (interview_session_id, question_id, question, answer_text, score, feedback, rag_used, model) VALUES (#{interviewSessionId}, #{questionId}, #{question}, #{answerText}, #{score}, #{feedback}, #{ragUsed}, #{model})
mapper.select: SELECT sample.* FROM interview_training_sample sample LEFT JOIN interview_session session ON session.id = sample.interview_session_id LEFT JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = session.application_case_id WHERE sample.deleted_at IS NULL AND (sample.interview_session_id IS NULL OR (session.deleted_at IS NULL AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL)) ORDER BY sample.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interview_training_sample sample LEFT JOIN interview_session session ON session.id = sample.interview_session_id LEFT JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = session.application_case_id WHERE sample.deleted_at IS NULL AND (sample.interview_session_id IS NULL OR (session.deleted_at IS NULL AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL))

SELECT AVG(sample.score) FROM interview_training_sample sample LEFT JOIN interview_session session ON session.id = sample.interview_session_id LEFT JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = session.application_case_id WHERE sample.deleted_at IS NULL AND (sample.interview_session_id IS NULL OR (session.deleted_at IS NULL AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL))
